stem: A right square prism has a height of 18 units. The volume of the prism is 4,050 cubic units. What is the length, in units, of an edge of the base?
rationale: The correct answer is 15. The volume of a right square prism with base edge s and height h is s²h. So 4,050 = s²(18), giving s² = 225 and s = 15 units.
